step_rationale: Monounsaturated fatty acid; upregulated in ACS-HTN; reflects lipid metabolism dysregulation.
mechanism: Oleic acid dysregulation in ACS-HTN reflects aberrant lipid metabolism and metabolic comorbidity-specific signatures in acute myocardial injury.

references.title: GC-MS validation and analysis of targeted plasma metabolites related to carbonyl stress in type 2 diabetes mellitus patients with and without acute coronary syndrome.
The impact of hypertension for metabolites in patients with acute coronary syndrome.
